mapper.select:
SELECT id, employer_account, job_description, salary_range, work_location, experience_requirement, education_requirement, update_time, status, university_name FROM job_info
employer_account = #{employerAccount}
AND status = 1
ORDER BY update_time DESC

SELECT id, employer_account, job_description, salary_range, work_location, experience_requirement, education_requirement, update_time, status, university_name FROM job_info WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 10
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM job_info WHERE employer_account = #{employerAccount} AND status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE job_info SET status = 0 WHERE id = #{positionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO job_info ( employer_account, salary_range, job_description, work_location, experience_requirement, education_requirement, status, university_name ) VALUES ( #{employerAccount}, #{salaryRange}, #{jobDescription}, #{workLocation}, #{experienceRequirement}, #{educationRequirement}, #{status}, #{universityName} )
mapper.update: UPDATE job_info SET employer_account = #{employerAccount}, salary_range = #{salaryRange}, job_description = #{jobDescription}, work_location = #{workLocation}, experience_requirement = #{experienceRequirement}, education_requirement = #{educationRequirement}, status = #{status}, university_name = #{universityName} WHERE id = #{id}
